description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (Date: 1100-1138). Fragment (upper right corner). In which Ṣedaqa ha-Meshorer ('the singer/poet') makes a declaration in favor of [...] b. Shemuel ha-Levi. Ṣedaqa ha-Meshorer is presumably Ṣedaqa b. Ṣemaḥ known from documents such as T-S 8.131 and Bodl. MS heb. d 66/7. No details of the present case are preserved.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
